en.question: If the price of sugar is increased by 25%, by what percentage must a household reduce consumption so that expenditure remains the same?

hi.question: चीनी के मूल्य में 25% वृद्धि हो, तो खपत कितने% घटाएँ कि व्यय समान रहे?

en.question: A candidate scored 30% marks and failed by 15 marks. Another candidate scored 42% marks and got 12 marks more than the passing marks. What are the maximum marks?

hi.question: एक छात्र 30% लाकर 15 अंकों से फेल, दूसरा 42% लाकर 12 अंक अधिक। अधिकतम अंक?

en.question: The population of a town increases by 10% every year. If the present population is 1,21,000, what was it 2 years ago?

hi.question: जनसंख्या 10% वार्षिक बढ़ती है। वर्तमान 1,21,000, तो 2 वर्ष पूर्व?

en.question: A number is increased by 20% and then decreased by 20%. What is the net percentage change?
en.explanation: Net change = a + b + (a x b)/100 = 20 - 20 + (-400)/100 = -4%. So 4% decrease.

en.question: If the price of sugar is increased by 25%, by how much percent must a family reduce its consumption to keep the expenditure unchanged?

hi.question: चीनी 25% बढ़ी, खपत कितने% घटाएँ कि व्यय न बदले?

en.question: 40% of a number is 180. What is 65% of that number?
In an election between two candidates, the winning candidate got 56% of total votes and won by a margin of 18,000 votes. How many total votes were cast?
A student scores 35% and fails by 20 marks. Another student scores 45% and passes by 10 marks. Find the passing marks.
